name: openpact-monorepo
description: P2P shared memory for software agents

scripts.build: npm run -w @openpact/sdk build && npm run -w @openpact/daemon build && npm run -w @openpact/mcp build && npm run -w @openpact/dashboard build && npm run -w @openpact/cli build
scripts.validate: npm run -w @openpact/daemon validate && npm run -w @openpact/sdk validate && npm run -w @openpact/mcp validate && npm run -w @openpact/skill validate && npm run -w @openpact/dashboard validate && npm run -w @openpact/cli validate && npm run -w openpact validate
scripts.test:all: npm run build && npm run validate && npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:examples
scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run validate && npm test
scripts.test:coverage: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' c8 --check-coverage --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --reporter=json npm run test:all && node scripts/check-apply-coverage.js
scripts.test:coverage:ci: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' c8 --check-coverage --reporter=lcov --reporter=text --reporter=json npm run test:ci && node scripts/check-apply-coverage.js
scripts.lint: eslint packages examples && prettier --check packages examples
